sql_array: CREATE TABLE domain_test (id UInt32, domain String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, idnaEncode(domain) AS encoded_domain FROM domain_test WHERE id = 1 AND encoded_domain IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (idnaEncode(domain) AND (id > 1)) AS logic_test FROM domain_test;
SELECT id, idnaEncode((CASE WHEN domain = '' THEN 'empty.domain' ELSE domain END)) AS encoded_test FROM domain_test HAVING encoded_test IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, idnaEncode(domain) FROM domain_test WHERE domain LIKE '%test%' AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM domain_test WHERE id > 2);
CREATE TABLE temp_domains AS SELECT id, idnaEncode(domain) FROM domain_test;
SELECT id, SUM(CASE WHEN idnaEncode(domain) IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER(PARTITION BY id) AS total_encoded_domains FROM domain_test;
SELECT id FROM domain_test WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM domain_test WHERE idnaEncode(domain) IS NOT NULL AND id > 1 AND domain NOT IN ('example.com')) AND id < 3;
